name: Italian Cucumber Salad (Easy)
recipeIngredient: red wine vinegar (enough to thoroughly soak the above)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cucumbers and onions in a bowl.
2. Add enough red wine vinegar to cover the vegetables.
3. Sprinkle black pepper to taste.
4. If using, add diced pepperoncini.
5. Stir gently to combine.
6. Cover the bowl and chill for at least 1 hour before serving.
7. The salad will keep well in the refrigerator for several days due to the vinegar.
